Header.promptPurpose: Design a statistics section header with a title (Our Impact), a subheading, and a short description. Clean and professional. Header should be centered. Soft background.

Stats Grid.promptPurpose: Design a stats/metrics section with 4 key metrics displayed in a grid. Each stat should have a number (large and bold), a label, and possibly an icon. Use a 4-column grid, 2-x-2. The stats should have an animated counter or some visual appeal. Cards or containers with subtle shadow. Background should be dark with accent color accents.

Footer.promptPurpose: Design a simple footer with copyright notice and quick links. Soft background, dark text. Minimal.
